purpose: Handle Luba's overlap decision (SEPARATE_DOMAIN or SHARED_INFRA). Store as ARCHITECTURE_DECISION RAG pattern (fulfills CF-796). Emit prereq.overlap.resolved to unblock downstream MISSING_FABRIC_INTERFACE gaps.
trigger: event prereq.overlap.decision_received with { specId, gapId, decision: SEPARATE_DOMAIN | SHARED_INFRA }

n1.description: Store decision as ARCHITECTURE_DECISION RAG pattern (CF-796) + update proposals index + emit resolved event. Store before emit (DNA-8).

document.content: Overlap decision for ${input.gapId}: ${input.decision}. Proposed: ${input.proposedService}. Existing: ${input.existingInterface}. Decision: keep separate or share infrastructure.

ironRules: CF-796: Decision MUST be stored as ARCHITECTURE_DECISION RAG pattern before emitting prereq.overlap.resolved
DNA-8: Both store actions (RAG pattern + proposals update) MUST precede the emit action
qualityGates: Proposals index updated with lubaDecision + decisionTimestamp
prereq.overlap.resolved event carries specId for T586 completion tracking
